positive: Minimalist abstract woodland scene, featuring clean silhouettes of various stylized woodland creatures (fox, owl, rabbit, deer) nestled amongst stylized bioluminescent forest elements (mushrooms, ferns, glowing vines). The composition should be circular and central, creating a cohesive border design. Use a restricted color palette of deep indigo, forest teal, creamy ivory, and accents of soft neon yellow/green for the luminescence. High contrast, strong graphic quality, clean linework, inspired by nature mandalas and negative space design. Designed for screen printing on a dark garment. Centered composition, seamless pattern suitability.
